title: ricinocarpus divaricatus
intro: Ricinocarpus divaricatus, also known as the Chinese tuckahoe or tuckahoe, is a type of plant that belongs to the Buxaceae family, native to Asia. The medicinal properties of Ricinocarpus divaricatus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting liver function, as well as having antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Ricinocarpus divaricatus is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
